title: This guy turned Esports knowledge into $40,000 on Polymarket. Here is exactly how
author: ksthd
selftext:
This trader made $40,000 on Polymarket using this simple strategy:

He trades LoL/CS2 markets and looks for mispricing based on his model. If the price on Polymarket is below fair probability, he enters the position

His strategy is simple:

\> Buys with limit orders  
\> Makes 5.1 trades per day  
\> Enters positions in the 0.5-0.7 range

His Polymarket account:  
https://polymarket.com/@afornson

App for copy trading:  
https://polymgloss.org

Using this strategy, he has a 67% win rate and consistently grows his capital

comments.author: Nitrilim
comments.body: This looks like how Hollywood imagines stockbrokers.
